items.name_en: CELIN* Upgraded Triomphe Tofu Bag 187366_Full Leather Dark Green. Made of imported cowhide with pure sheepskin lining and steel hardware. A new definition of the Triomphe concept, adding Parisian elements, vintage style, noble temperament, recognized by the fashion world again. A favorite among many stars. Classic reinvented, reshaping the classic with exquisite buckle design. Very in line with fashion trends✔️

Large, Small
CELIN* Triomphe Handbag: 💎New Box Series, featuring a double-C logo as the main buckle 〰️Inheriting the essence of Classic, with a simple and sharp square silhouette and micro-gloss calfskin, paired with sheepskin lining, full steel vintage Triomphe buckle, showcasing a retro and elegant charm. 💕Size: 22 X 16.5 X 7cm. 🔮No.: 188423 Large
